titleStmt.title: SII 20.217: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 217. (B.K. No. 22 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone built into the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1181, (expressed by the chronogram Indu-kari-Rudra) Siddhārthi, Jyēshtha, ba. 10, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1259, June 16, Monday, f.d.t. 10.

The inscription commemorates the death of Khaiya (also called Khaila) and Māyiga who voluntarily lost their lives following the death of their ‘mother’ Lakkhile, the wife of Āchidēva, a servant of Chāmuṇḍa-Daṇḍēśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kaṁnharabhūmipāḷakana rājyaśrīge saṁnmaṁḍanasthōmaṁ tānene kīrttivettu negaḷdaṁ cā
muṁḍadaṁḍēśanuddāmaṁ bhīmaparākramaṁ śacivanaṁtātaṁge hanmaṁta
rāmaṁgāḷenipaṁdadiṁ taḷedadācaṁ vayirikōḷāhaḷaṁ . Aṁtavarssukhadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamirddaṁdū . Iṁdukarirudrasaṁkheyoḷoṁdida śakanṛpana varuśa siddhārtthi
yoḷ saṁda varajyēṣṭa bahuḷadoḷaṁdesavā dasami sōmavārada dinadoḷū [.]
nirupamapuṁṇyamūrtti varaviprakulāṁnvayasaccaritre yī dhareyoḷagācidēvana ma
naḥpriye lakkhile nāriyellaraṁ sthiramirisiddu tāṁ mudade nākanivā
samaneyda beṁnoḷārsari paḍe gaṁḍareṁdu kali māyiganuṁ neṟe vī
ra khaiyyanuṁ . sthiramikke rāya kaṁnhara vara cavuḍaṁ tanapadācaneṁdatimu
dadiṁ parisidaru khaiyya māyyaṁ dharesuragiri caṁdrasū
ryyatāraṁbaregaṁ . mātṟu kaḷidaṁ baḷikkaṁ bhūtaḷadoḷagirppu
tamavudeṁdu jagatākhyātarvvide baḷisaṁdarmmātēṁ neṟe vīra kheyyanu
ṁ māyiganuṁ . tale paṟidu birddhu neṟe taṁbu
maṁ poḷakittu muṁḍavaṁ tā taleyaṁ balavaṁdattene khailana
kalitanavaticōdyamāytu lōkakkellaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
